  "analysis": "I can see the forward.py file. Now I know the network structure:
- A1 is shape (20, 10) - weight matrix input to hidden
- b1 is shape (20,) - bias for hidden layer
- A2 is shape (1, 20) - weight matrix hidden to output
- b2 is shape (1,) - bias for output layer

My strategy: Use finite differences to compute gradients at many points. Along random lines, find where the gradient changes (breakpoints).
